fields.summary: A mutable builder for constructing <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPath" /> objects incrementally.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKPathBuilder` provides a mutable, incremental API for building <xref:SkiaSharp.SKPath> objects.
Use it to append moves, lines, curves, arcs, and whole shapes, then call
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder.Detach> to obtain the finished path (transferring ownership)
or <xref:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder.Snapshot> to take a snapshot without resetting the builder.

`SKPathBuilder` implements <xref:System.IDisposable>. Always dispose of it when finished to
release native resources, for example with a `using` statement.

## Examples

```csharp
using var builder = new SKPathBuilder();
builder.MoveTo(0, 0);
builder.LineTo(100, 0);
builder.LineTo(100, 100);
builder.Close();

using SKPath path = builder.Detach();
canvas.DrawPath(path, paint);
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Initializes a new, empty <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> instance.

entries.signature: public SKPathBuilder ();

fields.summary: Initializes a new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> instance with an initial copy of the specified path.

params.path: The path whose contours are copied into this builder.

entries.signature: public SKPathBuilder (SkiaSharp.SKPath path);

fields.summary: Appends an arc of the specified oval starting at <paramref name="startAngle" /> and sweeping <paramref name="sweepAngle" /> degrees.

params.oval: The bounding rectangle of the oval.
params.startAngle: The starting angle in degrees, measured clockwise from the positive x-axis.
params.sweepAngle: The sweep angle in degrees, measured clockwise.

entries.signature: public void AddArc (SkiaSharp.SKRect oval, float startAngle, float sweepAngle);

fields.summary: Appends a circle contour with the specified center and radius.

params.dir: The direction in which the circle contour is wound.

entries.signature: public void AddCircle (float x, float y, float radius, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection dir = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

fields.summary: Appends an oval contour that fills the specified bounding rectangle.

params.direction: The direction in which the oval contour is wound.
params.rect: The bounding rectangle of the oval.

entries.signature: public void AddOval (SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

fields.summary: Appends the contours of the specified path using the given append mode.

params.mode: Whether to append the path or extend the last open contour.
params.other: The path whose contours are appended.

entries.signature: public void AddPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath other, SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode mode = SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode.Append);

fields.summary: Appends the contours of the specified path after applying the given transform matrix.

params.matrix: The matrix applied to each point of <paramref name="other" /> before appending.
params.mode: Whether to append the path or extend the last open contour.
params.other: The path whose contours are appended.

entries.signature: public void AddPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath other, in SkiaSharp.SKMatrix matrix, SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode mode = SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode.Append);

fields.summary: Appends the contours of the specified path translated by the given offset.

params.dx: The horizontal translation applied to each point.
params.dy: The vertical translation applied to each point.
params.mode: Whether to append the path or extend the last open contour.
params.other: The path whose contours are appended.

entries.signature: public void AddPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath other, float dx, float dy, SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode mode = SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode.Append);

fields.summary: Appends a polygon contour from an array of points.

params.close: <see langword="true" /> to close the polygon contour; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
params.points: The array of vertices of the polygon.

entries.signature: public void AddPoly (SkiaSharp.SKPoint[] points, bool close = true);

fields.summary: Appends a polygon contour from a read-only span of points.

params.close: <see langword="true" /> to close the polygon contour; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
params.points: The read-only span of vertices of the polygon.

entries.signature: public void AddPoly (System.ReadOnlySpan<SkiaSharp.SKPoint> points, bool close = true);

fields.summary: Appends a rectangle contour wound in the specified direction.

params.direction: The direction in which the rectangle contour is wound.

entries.signature: public void AddRect (SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

fields.summary: Appends a rectangle contour wound in the specified direction, beginning at the specified corner index.

params.direction: The direction in which the rectangle contour is wound.
params.startIndex: The corner index at which to start winding (0–3).

entries.signature: public void AddRect (SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction, uint startIndex);

fields.summary: Appends a rounded rectangle contour wound in the specified direction.

params.direction: The direction in which the rounded rectangle contour is wound.

entries.signature: public void AddRoundRect (SkiaSharp.SKRoundRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

fields.summary: Appends a rounded rectangle contour wound in the specified direction, beginning at the specified corner index.

params.direction: The direction in which the rounded rectangle contour is wound.
params.startIndex: The corner index at which to start winding (0–3).

entries.signature: public void AddRoundRect (SkiaSharp.SKRoundRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction, uint startIndex);

fields.summary: Appends a rounded rectangle contour with individual horizontal and vertical corner radii.

params.dir: The direction in which the rounded rectangle contour is wound.

entries.signature: public void AddRoundRect (SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, float rx, float ry, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection dir = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

fields.summary: Appends an SVG-style arc using two tangent points and a radius.

params.point2: The second tangent point (end of the arc).

entries.signature: public void ArcTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point2, float radius);

fields.summary: Appends an arc of the specified oval, optionally forcing a move to the arc start.

params.forceMoveTo: <see langword="true" /> to start a new contour at the arc start; <see langword="false" /> to connect from the current point.
params.oval: The bounding rectangle of the oval.
params.startAngle: The starting angle in degrees, measured clockwise from the positive x-axis.
params.sweepAngle: The sweep angle in degrees, measured clockwise.

entries.signature: public void ArcTo (SkiaSharp.SKRect oval, float startAngle, float sweepAngle, bool forceMoveTo);

fields.summary: Appends an SVG-style elliptical arc using a radius point, rotation, arc-size flag, sweep direction, and end point.

params.largeArc: Specifies whether to use the large or small arc.
params.r: The x and y radii of the ellipse.
params.sweep: The direction of the arc sweep.
params.xAxisRotate: The rotation of the ellipse's x-axis in degrees.
params.xy: The end point of the arc.

entries.signature: public void ArcTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint r, float xAxisRotate, SkiaSharp.SKPathArcSize largeArc, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection sweep, SkiaSharp.SKPoint xy);

fields.summary: Appends an SVG-style arc using two tangent point coordinates and a radius.

params.x1: The x-coordinate of the first tangent point.
params.x2: The x-coordinate of the second tangent point (end of the arc).
params.y1: The y-coordinate of the first tangent point.
params.y2: The y-coordinate of the second tangent point (end of the arc).

entries.signature: public void ArcTo (float x1, float y1, float x2, float y2, float radius);

fields.summary: Appends an SVG-style elliptical arc using scalar radii, rotation, arc-size flag, sweep direction, and end coordinates.

params.largeArc: Specifies whether to use the large or small arc.
params.sweep: The direction of the arc sweep.
params.x: The x-coordinate of the end point.
params.xAxisRotate: The rotation of the ellipse's x-axis in degrees.
params.y: The y-coordinate of the end point.

entries.signature: public void ArcTo (float rx, float ry, float xAxisRotate, SkiaSharp.SKPathArcSize largeArc, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection sweep, float x, float y);

fields.summary: Closes the current contour by appending a line from the current point to the start of the contour.

entries.signature: public void Close ();

fields.summary: Appends a conic curve from the current point through the control points to the end point, weighted by <paramref name="w" />.

params.w: The conic weight; <c>1</c> produces a quadratic, values greater than <c>1</c> widen the curve toward the control point.

entries.signature: public void ConicTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, float w);

fields.summary: Appends a conic curve from the current point through a control point to an end point, weighted by <paramref name="w" />.

params.w: The conic weight; <c>1</c> produces a quadratic, values greater than <c>1</c> widen the curve toward the control point.
params.x0: The x-coordinate of the control point.
params.x1: The x-coordinate of the end point.
params.y0: The y-coordinate of the control point.
params.y1: The y-coordinate of the end point.

entries.signature: public void ConicTo (float x0, float y0, float x1, float y1, float w);

fields.summary: Appends a cubic Bézier curve from the current point through two control points to the end point.

entries.signature: public void CubicTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point2);

fields.summary: Appends a cubic Bézier curve from the current point through two control points to an end point specified by coordinates.

params.x0: The x-coordinate of the first control point.
params.x1: The x-coordinate of the second control point.
params.x2: The x-coordinate of the end point.
params.y0: The y-coordinate of the first control point.
params.y1: The y-coordinate of the second control point.
params.y2: The y-coordinate of the end point.

entries.signature: public void CubicTo (float x0, float y0, float x1, float y1, float x2, float y2);

fields.summary: Returns the current path as an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPath" /> and resets the builder to an empty state.
fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPath" /> containing the contours that were built, with ownership transferred to the caller.

entries.signature: public SkiaSharp.SKPath Detach ();

fields.summary: Releases the resources used by this <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> instance.

params.disposing: <see langword="true" /> to release both managed and native resources; <see langword="false" /> to release only native resources.

entries.signature: protected override void Dispose (bool disposing);

fields.summary: Releases the native Skia path builder object.

entries.signature: protected override void DisposeNative ();

fields.summary: Gets or sets the fill type that determines how the path interior is computed when the path is drawn.
fields.value: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathFillType" /> value specifying the winding rule used to determine the path interior.

entries.signature: public SkiaSharp.SKPathFillType FillType { get; set; }

fields.summary: Appends a line from the current point to the specified point.

params.point: The end point of the line.

entries.signature: public void LineTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point);

fields.summary: Appends a line from the current point to the specified coordinates.

params.x: The x-coordinate of the end point.
params.y: The y-coordinate of the end point.

entries.signature: public void LineTo (float x, float y);

fields.summary: Starts a new contour at the specified point.

params.point: The starting point of the new contour.

entries.signature: public void MoveTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point);

fields.summary: Starts a new contour at the specified coordinates.

params.x: The x-coordinate of the starting point.
params.y: The y-coordinate of the starting point.

entries.signature: public void MoveTo (float x, float y);

fields.summary: Appends a quadratic Bézier curve from the current point through the control point to the end point.

entries.signature: public void QuadTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1);

fields.summary: Appends a quadratic Bézier curve from the current point through a control point to an end point specified by coordinates.

params.x0: The x-coordinate of the control point.
params.x1: The x-coordinate of the end point.
params.y0: The y-coordinate of the control point.
params.y1: The y-coordinate of the end point.

entries.signature: public void QuadTo (float x0, float y0, float x1, float y1);

fields.summary: Appends an SVG-style relative elliptical arc using a radius point, rotation, arc-size flag, sweep direction, and relative end point.

params.largeArc: Specifies whether to use the large or small arc.
params.r: The x and y radii of the ellipse.
params.sweep: The direction of the arc sweep.
params.xAxisRotate: The rotation of the ellipse's x-axis in degrees.
params.xy: The offset from the current point to the end point.

entries.signature: public void RArcTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint r, float xAxisRotate, SkiaSharp.SKPathArcSize largeArc, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection sweep, SkiaSharp.SKPoint xy);

fields.summary: Appends an SVG-style relative elliptical arc using scalar radii, rotation, arc-size flag, sweep direction, and relative end coordinates.

params.largeArc: Specifies whether to use the large or small arc.
params.sweep: The direction of the arc sweep.
params.x: The x-offset from the current point to the end point.
params.xAxisRotate: The rotation of the ellipse's x-axis in degrees.
params.y: The y-offset from the current point to the end point.

entries.signature: public void RArcTo (float rx, float ry, float xAxisRotate, SkiaSharp.SKPathArcSize largeArc, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection sweep, float x, float y);

fields.summary: Appends a relative conic curve from the current point through a relative control point to a relative end point, weighted by <paramref name="w" />.

params.point0: The offset from the current point to the control point.
params.point1: The offset from the current point to the end point.

entries.signature: public void RConicTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, float w);

fields.summary: Appends a relative conic curve from the current point through a relative control point to a relative end point, weighted by <paramref name="w" />.

params.dx0: The x-offset from the current point to the control point.
params.dx1: The x-offset from the current point to the end point.
params.dy0: The y-offset from the current point to the control point.
params.dy1: The y-offset from the current point to the end point.

entries.signature: public void RConicTo (float dx0, float dy0, float dx1, float dy1, float w);

fields.summary: Appends a relative cubic Bézier curve through two relative control points to a relative end point.

params.point0: The offset from the current point to the first control point.
params.point1: The offset from the current point to the second control point.
params.point2: The offset from the current point to the end point.

entries.signature: public void RCubicTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point2);

fields.summary: Appends a relative cubic Bézier curve through two relative control points to a relative end point specified by offsets.

params.dx0: The x-offset to the first control point.
params.dx1: The x-offset to the second control point.
params.dx2: The x-offset to the end point.
params.dy0: The y-offset to the first control point.
params.dy1: The y-offset to the second control point.
params.dy2: The y-offset to the end point.

entries.signature: public void RCubicTo (float dx0, float dy0, float dx1, float dy1, float dx2, float dy2);

fields.summary: Resets the builder to an empty state, discarding all contours.

entries.signature: public void Reset ();

fields.summary: Appends the contours of the specified path in reverse order.

params.other: The path whose contours are appended in reverse.

entries.signature: public void ReverseAddPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath other);

fields.summary: Appends a line from the current point to a point offset from the current point by the specified vector.

params.point: The offset from the current point to the end point.

entries.signature: public void RLineTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point);

fields.summary: Appends a line from the current point to a point offset by the specified amounts.

params.dx: The x-offset from the current point.
params.dy: The y-offset from the current point.

entries.signature: public void RLineTo (float dx, float dy);

fields.summary: Starts a new contour at a point offset from the current point by the specified vector.

params.point: The offset from the current point to the new contour start.

entries.signature: public void RMoveTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point);

fields.summary: Starts a new contour at a point offset from the current point by the specified amounts.

params.dx: The x-offset from the current point.
params.dy: The y-offset from the current point.

entries.signature: public void RMoveTo (float dx, float dy);

fields.summary: Appends a relative quadratic Bézier curve through a relative control point to a relative end point.

params.point0: The offset from the current point to the control point.
params.point1: The offset from the current point to the end point.

entries.signature: public void RQuadTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1);

fields.summary: Appends a relative quadratic Bézier curve through a relative control point to a relative end point specified by offsets.

params.dx0: The x-offset from the current point to the control point.
params.dx1: The x-offset from the current point to the end point.
params.dy0: The y-offset from the current point to the control point.
params.dy1: The y-offset from the current point to the end point.

entries.signature: public void RQuadTo (float dx0, float dy0, float dx1, float dy1);

fields.summary: Returns a snapshot of the current path as an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPath" /> without resetting the builder.
fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPath" /> that is a snapshot of the contours built so far.

entries.signature: public SkiaSharp.SKPath Snapshot ();
